original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: chrome-devtools
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: Browser debugging, performance profiling, and automation via Chrome DevTools MCP. Use when user says "debug this page", "take a screenshot", "check network requests", "profile performance", "inspect console errors", or "analyze page load". Do NOT use for full E2E test suites (use playwright-skill) or non-browser debugging.
